zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton於1412年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Sir John de Throckmorton30歲，母親Lady Alianore de la Spine27歲。他於大約1446年與Margaret Olney在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年7月13日在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton于1412年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Throckmorton30岁，母亲Lady Alianore de la Spine27岁。他于大约1446年与Margaret Olney在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年7月13日在英国武斯特斯爾福拉德波利享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton was born in 1412, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir John de Throckmorton, was 30 and his mother, Lady Alianore de la Spine, was 27. He married Margaret Olney about 1446, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 13 July 1475, in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Engla: St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton est né en 1412, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Throckmorton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianore de la Spine, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Olney environ 1446, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1475, à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Engla: St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton 1412 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Throckmorton 30 und seine Mutter Lady Alianore de la Spine 27. Er hat um 1446 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England Margaret Olney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Juli 1475 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton è nato il nel 1412 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Throckmorton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alianore de la Spine, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Olney circa 1446, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 13 luglio 1475, nel Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughtonが1412年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Throckmortonは30歳，母Lady Alianore de la Spineは27歳であった。約1446年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンでMargaret Olneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年7月13日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Engla: 영국 수폴크 스트 마거릿 소우스 엘함
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton(이)가 1412년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Throckmorton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alianore de la Spine(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1446년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Margaret Olney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 7월 13일 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Engla: St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton nasceu em 1412, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Throckmorton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alianore de la Spine, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Olney aproximadamente 1446, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de julho de 1475, em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Engla: ст маргарет соут элмхам, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton родился в 1412 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Throckmorton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianore de la Spine, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Olney около 1446 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер 13 июля 1475 г. в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton nació en 1412, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Throckmorton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Alianore de la Spine, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Olney aproximadamente 1446, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 13 de julio de 1475, en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
